concept: Premium, AI-native WhatsApp Business Assistant. Deep obsidian backgrounds with glowing Emerald (WhatsApp) accents and structural greys.

fonts.heading: Outfit
fonts.instructions: Import these from Google Fonts in index.css or index.html.

spacing_and_layout.padding: Generous spacing. Main sections use py-24 or py-32.
spacing_and_layout.grid: Bento Grid (Mode A: Tetris) for Features. Base: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4, tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6). Ensure span asymmetry.
spacing_and_layout.radius: rounded-2xl for major cards, rounded-xl for inner UI elements.

components.buttons: Shadcn Button heavily customized. Primary CTA: Emerald green with subtle glow and dark text. Must include explicit hover states. Secondary CTA: Outline with zinc-800 border.
components.cards: Dark flat cards with 1px border-zinc-800. Background zinc-900/50. Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and border transition to emerald-500/30.
components.navigation: Crystal Glass sticky header: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#050505]/70 border-b border-zinc-800/50. Include logo, 4 links, and Book Demo CTA.
components.modal: Shadcn Dialog for Waitlist. Embedded form UI with premium styling. Avoid generic inputs; use Shadcn Input heavily restyled for dark mode.
components.accordion: Shadcn Accordion for FAQ. Border-b on items, clear hover states for triggers.

interactions: Hero WhatsApp Chat: Use framer-motion staggered fade-ins and Y-transforms to simulate a live AI WhatsApp conversation.
Hover Micro-interactions: Cards and buttons should smoothly transition transform and border color.
Scroll Animations: Fade-in sections using framer-motion `whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}`.

images.description: Dark high-end abstract background with emerald green particles and minimal grids.
images.usage: Use as an absolute background image in the Hero section, masked or with opacity-30 so it doesn't overpower the text.

images.description: High-end UI UX dark mode dashboard mockup with glowing charts.
images.usage: Place in the Dashboard section. Wrap in a container with a subtle zinc-800 border and inner shadow.

images.description: Cinematic portrait of a modern Indian business owner looking at smartphone.
images.usage: Use in the 'Problem' or 'Voice Workflow' section to ground the AI technology with a human element.

media.icons: Use lucide-react for all iconography (e.g., CheckCircle, MessageSquare, Mic, Zap). For social proof logos, use text or lucide icons to maintain the dark premium feel, avoiding colored raster images.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark mode color palette. Ensure contrast ratios are met (no pure black on pure black).
Hero section MUST feature a visual animated WhatsApp conversation mockup (build with HTML/Tailwind/Framer Motion) showing Elzoha managing a business task.
Build the 8 Solution Feature Cards using the Bento Grid layout style. Make sure spans are asymmetrical.
Implement 3 Pricing tiers: Starter (₹999), Growth (₹2999) with a 'Most Popular' highlight, and Business (Custom).
The 'Join Waitlist' button MUST open a Shadcn Dialog containing a Kit form embed/mockup. Demo booking can link to an external URL.
Embed `data-testid` attributes on all interactive elements (buttons, links, dialog triggers, form inputs).
Do NOT use text-8xl or above. Respect fluid text scales capped at text-6xl for hero headings.
